mapper.sql:
FROM matched_products mp JOIN products p ON p.id = mp.id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, SUM(ppo.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM matched_products mp2 JOIN product_options po ON po.product_id = mp2.id JOIN purchase_product_options ppo ON ppo.product_option_id = po.id GROUP BY po.product_id ) purchase_stat ON purchase_stat.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pp.product_id, pp.picture_saved_location FROM product_pictures pp JOIN ( SELECT pp2.product_id, MIN(pp2.id) AS picture_id FROM matched_products mp2 JOIN product_pictures pp2 ON pp2.product_id = mp2.id GROUP BY pp2.product_id ) first_picture ON first_picture.picture_id = pp.id ) pp ON pp.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, MIN(hp.hot_deal_price) AS sale_price, MAX(FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / hp.original_price * 100)) AS discount_rate FROM matched_products mp2 JOIN product_options po ON po.product_id = mp2.id JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.product_option_id = po.id JOIN hot_deals h ON h.id = hp.hot_deal_id WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at GROUP BY po.product_id ) deal_stat ON deal_stat.product_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT f.product_id FROM matched_products mp2 JOIN favorites f ON f.product_id = mp2.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ) favorite_stat ON favorite_stat.product_id = p.id
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, deal_stat.sale_price AS salePrice, NVL(deal_stat.discount_rate, 0) AS discountRate, p.view_count AS viewCount, NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) AS totalQuantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation,
CASE WHEN favorite_stat.product_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS favorite
0 AS favorite
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) ASC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.id ASC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
